name: wikillm
description: LLM-maintained knowledge bases powered by Claude Code/Codex and Obsidian. Ingest sources, compile wiki articles, cross-link, lint, and query from markdown.

interface.shortDescription: Maintain a compiled markdown knowledge base from raw sources.
interface.longDescription: wikillm turns raw docs, papers, notes, and clips into an Obsidian-ready wiki that Codex can ingest, lint, query, and keep current with automations.
defaultPrompt: Set up a wikillm knowledge base for this repo.
Ingest new raw sources into the wiki.
